nodes.context: Yakuza organization based in Fukuoka, Japan, designated with estimated membership of 60.
One of five independent designated yakuza syndicates based in Fukuoka Prefecture.
One of five independent designated yakuza syndicates based in Fukuoka Prefecture.
One of five independent designated yakuza syndicates based in Fukuoka Prefecture.
One of five independent designated yakuza syndicates based in Fukuoka Prefecture.
Major yakuza syndicate; Fukuhaku-kai had conflict with it in 2004.
Anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation formed by northern-Kyushu organizations excluding Kyushu Seido-kai.

edges.evidence_quote: The Fukuhaku-kai has never been a member of this federation, however has caused at least one conflict with the Yamaguchi-gumi, which involved firearms, in 2004.
edges.context: Fukuhaku-kai had a conflict with Yamaguchi-gumi involving firearms in 2004.

edges.evidence_quote: The Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with four different Yamaguchi-affiliates over the concessions of Nakasu , the largest red-light district in Kyushu, and also with the Dojin-kai and Kudo-kai over their attempts to enter the same territory.
edges.context: Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with Dojin-kai over attempts to enter Nakasu territory.

edges.context: Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with Kudo-kai over attempts to enter Nakasu territory.
